name: DeskMate
description: 将同组学生分配到相邻座位。优先寻找水平连续座位块，可回退到纵向邻接。⚠️ 此策略极不稳定：受前排分配和固定座位影响较大，组员被拆散后仅能就近安插单人。
author: A_Pair Team

description.zh-CN: 每行配置一桌学生。学生选择器数量由会场文件的每桌人数自动决定。
description.en-US: Each row configures one desk of students. The number of student pickers is determined by the venue's seats-per-desk setting.

DeskMate_Split.zh-CN: 同桌组（{0}）中的 {1} 已被前排策略分配，该组已拆散
DeskMate_Split.en-US: Desk-mate group ({0}) member(s) {1} already assigned to front row, group split

DeskMate_AllSplit.zh-CN: 所有同桌组均无法形成有效组（成员被前排策略分散或不足2人）
DeskMate_AllSplit.en-US: All desk-mate groups invalid (members scattered by front-row strategy or fewer than 2)

DeskMate_NoSeats.zh-CN: 同桌组（{0}）无法找到连续座位，已跳过
DeskMate_NoSeats.en-US: Desk-mate group ({0}) could not find contiguous seats, skipped
